subject: Re: object reference not set to an instance of an object
body:
In my experience this issue occurs when you deselect images from the tilt 
series during pre-processing in IMOD. However, is there an actual 
work-around to pass the information about deselected images during 
alignment in IMOD? 
Thanks and all the best,

Felix 

teg...@gmail.com schrieb am Montag, 19. September 2022 um 17:39:43 UTC+2:

> Hi mrJ,
>
> Is there anything different about the processing of those series in IMOD 
> compared to the other 3? Skipped tilts? Added pre-rotation?
>
> Cheers,
> Dimitry
>
> On Monday, September 19, 2022 at 4:23:51 PM UTC+5 mrJ wrote:
>
>> hi all, 
>>
>> I do the usual tilt series pipeline from WARP to IMOD then re-import to 
>> WARP.  However when re-importing to WARP I get the error " object reference 
>> not set to an instance of an object".  I have 10 tomos and only 3 can be 
>> reimported.  No idea what is happening with the other 7.  Literally are all 
>> being treated identically.  
>>
>> had this problem in the past and it still persists.  Previously I 
>> resolved it by using the nightly build, but that is not working anymore.  I 
>> am running 10.9, and when I ran nightly build 20201104 this solved the 
>> issue before.  However now when I try running with that version I get the 
>> error "Invalid URI : The URI is Empty".    
>>
>> Thanks
>>
>>
>>
>>
